kill_fact: No kill_fact found. The bear thesis is the live case and every load-bearing fact verifies against primary/credible sources: Q2 FY26 (May-7-2026) $289M rev / $1.09 adj EPS / record 1.5:1 book-to-bill (CFO Kober: 'largest quarterly bookings in the company's history') / DC $98.2M +14.5% q/q; CEO Daly verbatim raised DC FY26 base case 'from 35% to 40% to over 60%' — the catalyst HAS fired. Valuation extremes confirmed (~$391-393, +128.5% YTD, +191% 1yr, fwd P/E ~59x, EV/EBITDA ~117x, GF Value $170 = ~130% overvalued). Net cash ~$325M after $161M converts repaid confirmed. Insiders confirmed NET SELLERS into the move (CEO Daly, dir Ribar, Summit/Chung 43,268sh @ $378, SVP Hwang, Ocampo trusts 315,272sh). The bear survives the kill-check — the asymmetry is genuinely inverted and the fired catalyst leaves no upside forcing function.

Both still confirm 'richest-in-cohort / no margin of safety.' Q3 FY26 guide (rev $331-339M, adj EPS $1.31-$1.37, GM 59-60%, FY exit closer to 60%) corroborates the strengthening-business / spent-re-rate framing — the next print is a confirmation test of a fully-priced super-guide, exactly as the bear argues.
